# FileWriter

> Writes content to a file. Creates parent directories if needed. Includes safety checks to prevent writing to dangerous paths.

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Version | 1.0 |
| Category | file_system |
| Requires network | no |
| Requires credentials | no |
| Modifies state | yes |
| Cacheable | auto |

## Parameters

These are sent by the LLM at runtime when it calls the tool.

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| file_path | string | yes | - | Path to file to write (absolute or relative to current directory) |
| content | string | yes | - | Content to write to file |
| overwrite | boolean | no | false | Whether to overwrite existing file (default: false) |
| create_dirs | boolean | no | true | Whether to create parent directories if they don't exist (default: true) |

## YAML Config

Optional overrides passed via the agent YAML config block.

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| allowed_root | string | - | Root directory for file writes. Files can only be written within this directory tree. |

## Usage

### Simple (no config)

```yaml
agent:
  tools:
    - "FileWriter"
```

### With config overrides

```yaml
agent:
  tools:
    - name: "FileWriter"
      config:
        allowed_root: "/your/path"
```

## Result Schema

Returns unstructured text.
